filename: Analythics - Intakes and Triages Market Estimations.xlsx
summary: This Excel spreadsheet details unit economics and market estimations for KeepMeCompany's AI phone agents within NHS GP practices. It compares labor costs and time savings between human receptionists and the AI Co-Pilot, outlining specific pricing strategies and margin targets. The document includes mixed-language notes regarding cost assumptions and revenue capture goals.
